vocab.example: I frequently consult Wikipedia, as it serves as a comprehensive repository of knowledge on almost any subject imaginable.

vocab.meaning: nội dung được chọn lọc kỹ lưỡng
vocab.example: I prefer websites that offer curated content because they filter out the noise and present high-quality information.
Financial websites with an interactive dashboard allow me to track my investments and market trends in real-time.

vocab.meaning: sàn giao dịch giữa các cá nhân
vocab.example: I often browse a peer-to-peer marketplace to find unique vintage items that aren't available in mainstream stores.

vocab.meaning: các cuộc thảo luận mang tính trí tuệ
vocab.example: I am drawn to platforms like Quora or Medium that facilitate deep intellectual discourse on social and scientific issues.

vocab.meaning: phạm vi kiến thức rộng lớn như bách khoa toàn thư
vocab.example: The website’s encyclopedic reach makes it an indispensable tool for my university research projects.

vocab.meaning: phân tích dữ liệu thời gian thực
vocab.example: News sites providing real-time analytics on election results keep me glued to my screen during major political events.
I tend to avoid websites with a cluttered layout, as they make it incredibly difficult to find the information I need.

vocab.meaning: các bài hướng dẫn mang tính giáo dục
vocab.example: YouTube is my go-to for educational tutorials whenever I want to master a new software or a culinary skill.

vocab.meaning: các chuyên mục được đăng tải trên nhiều nền tảng
vocab.example: I regularly read syndicated columns from world-renowned economists to stay updated on global financial shifts.
